headline: How The Nucor (NUE) Investment Story Is Shifting With New Analyst Views And Tariff News
summary: Nucor’s updated fair value estimate has shifted from US$192.55 to US$240.71, a change of about 25% that puts a spotlight on how the story around the stock is evolving. Recent research updates from firms such as JPMorgan, Goldman Sachs, Citi and UBS show a clear split between bullish and cautious views, as analysts refresh their models around profitability and growth projects. As you read on, you will see how to track these moving targets and make sense of the evolving narrative around...

headline: Should Record Q1 2026 Shipments and Higher Q2 Outlook Require Action From Nucor (NUE) Investors?
summary: Nucor Corporation recently reported a strong first quarter of 2026, with higher sales and profits supported by record shipments, improved metal margins and higher average steel selling prices, alongside continued progress on major capital projects such as the West Virginia sheet mill and Indiana coating complex. An interesting takeaway is that management signaled expectations for higher consolidated earnings in the second quarter across all segments, underpinned by firm demand, supportive...

headline: What’s Next for Cleveland-Cliffs Stock?
summary: Here’s a number that jumps off the page: Cleveland-Cliffs' (NYSE:CLF) lost more than $1.4 billion in 2025 on $18.6 billion in revenue. Yet the stock still trades around $11, well above its 52-week low of $5.63. Something may finally be changing.
